add_hotel_prompt: Add a hotel or place to stay
addon_activation_hint: Turn this add-on on or off for the trip
addon_budget_desc: Plan and track spending across all categories: with multi-currency support, custom categories, and detailed expense breakdowns for the whole trip
addon_chat_desc: A shared in-app chat for all trip members
addon_hotels_desc: Collaboratively choose hotels with your trip members. Anyone can suggest options, the group votes, and you lock in the final pick together.
addon_telegram_desc: A Telegram bot with full access to your itinerary. Ask it anything about the trip, or get automatic reminders for upcoming events: cancellation deadlines, checkouts, flights, and more.
budget_addon_off_desc: The full budget breakdown is an optional Pro feature of the trip. Enable it in the trip settings to open the budget section.
budget_no_rate: Some expenses are not converted: no rate
choice_ai_desc: Describe your idea, AI will pick cities, dates and optional activities
choice_manual_desc: Fill in a title and description, add cities yourself later
choice_subtitle: How would you like to start?
display_currency_hint: The base currency for your trip budget. Expenses in other currencies are automatically converted to this one.
form_dates_hint: Trip dates are derived automatically from your events
load_error_desc: Something went wrong temporarily. Check your connection and try again
no_access_desc: You may not be in the participant list, the invite was revoked, or the trip was deleted
no_dates_desc: Set the trip dates to see the timeline
notif_availability_desc: Alert if room stock falls below 5.
notif_price_drop_desc: Notify when favorite hotels lower rates
pro_locked_lenses: Calendar, budget breakdown, AI and chat are Pro-only
settings_subtitle: Manage your trip settings and add-ons
share_desc: Copy the link and send it to participants, it opens without signing in
timeline_empty_desc: Add hotels, transfers and activities, they will appear here in chronological order
